prompt: Please perform a comprehensive EDA on the provided dataset 'sample_data.csv'. Follow all professional standards including technical setup, deep statistical analysis, and 10+ visualizations with interpretations. The final report should be in Korean.

assertions.name: report-in-korean
assertions.text: The report is entirely in Korean.

assertions.name: 10-plus-visualizations
assertions.text: There are at least 10 different visualizations.

assertions.name: images-in-images-dir
assertions.text: Images are saved in the 'images/' directory.

assertions.name: relative-image-paths
assertions.text: Report uses relative paths for images.

assertions.name: long-descriptive-stats
assertions.text: Each descriptive statistic has a 1000+ character report.

assertions.name: tables-per-viz
assertions.text: Each visualization has a corresponding table (cross-tab, pivot, etc.).

assertions.name: 50-char-interpretations
assertions.text: Each visualization has a 50+ character interpretation.

assertions.name: uv-venv-used
assertions.text: The skill uses 'uv' and '.venv' without recreating existing ones.
